description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a formal, tailored suit with a collared shirt and vest underneath. He is wearing sunglasses and has neatly styled short hair. The suit is complemented by matching dress shoes, and the overall appearance is clean and sophisticated, suitable for business or upscale urban environments. The figure's posture is upright and relaxed, with arms slightly bent at the elbows and hands relaxed at his sides. No accessories such as bags or handheld items are visible, and the clothing fits closely to the body, emphasizing a professional look. The surface of the clothing and shoes appears smooth and well-maintained, with a subtle sheen indicating a high-quality finish.
description: A formally dressed adult male in a tailored suit, sunglasses, and dress shoes, standing upright with a polished, professional appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the suit's lapels, collared shirt, vest, sunglasses, and facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the fit of the suit, and the side of the shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the suit jacket, trousers, and the hairstyle from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, suit fit, and the right side of the shoes and head.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with collared shirt, vest, and sunglasses
